base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of block_used_deactivated — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. Post-hit question-block state — tile replaced with solid orange used-block texture. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Post-hit question-block state — tile replaced with solid orange used-block texture; static, persists until level reload
